questions.prompt: Nuoc Van Lang la nha nuoc dau tien cua nguoi Viet, do ai dung len?
questions.explanation: Hung Vuong (nguoi con ca cua Au Co) la nguoi lap ra nuoc Van Lang.

questions.prompt: Thu do cua nuoc Van Lang dat o dau?
questions.explanation: Phong Chau (nay thuoc tinh Phu Tho) la thu do cua nuoc Van Lang.

questions.prompt: Truyen thuyet ke rang Lac Long Quan va Au Co sinh ra bao nhieu nguoi con?
questions.explanation: Lac Long Quan va Au Co sinh ra boc tram trung, no ra 100 nguoi con.

questions.prompt: Nuoc Van Lang co tat ca bao nhieu doi Hung Vuong?
questions.explanation: Co tat ca 18 doi Hung Vuong truyen ngoi cha truyen con.

questions.prompt: "Con Rong chau Tien" co nghia la gi?
options: Con cua Rong va Tien - chi nguon goc nguoi Viet
Ten mot con vat trong truyen co
questions.explanation: "Con Rong chau Tien" chi nguon goc cao quy cua dan toc Viet Nam, vi cha la giong Rong, me la giong Tien.

questions.prompt: Ai la nguoi sang lap nuoc Au Lac?
questions.explanation: Thuc Phan danh bai Hung Vuong thu 18, tu xung An Duong Vuong, lap nuoc Au Lac.

questions.prompt: Kinh do cua nuoc Au Lac la gi?
questions.explanation: Co Loa (nay thuoc Ha Noi) la kinh do cua nuoc Au Lac, noi tieng voi thanh hinh xoan oc.

questions.prompt: Thanh Co Loa co dac diem gi noi bat?
options: Hinh xoan oc, nhieu vong thanh
questions.explanation: Thanh Co Loa co hinh xoan oc doc dao voi nhieu vong thanh bao boc.

questions.prompt: Trong dong Dong Son la bieu tuong cua dieu gi?
questions.explanation: Trong dong Dong Son la hien vat tieu bieu cua nen van minh Viet co, khoang 2000 nam truoc.

questions.prompt: Don vi hanh chinh thoi Van Lang goi la gi?
questions.explanation: Thoi Van Lang, nuoc chia thanh 15 bo - tuong tu nhu tinh ngay nay.

questions.prompt: Ngay Gio To Hung Vuong hang nam la ngay nao (am lich)?
questions.explanation: Ngay Gio To Hung Vuong la mung 10 thang 3 am lich, la ngay le quoc gia.

questions.prompt: Nuoc Au Lac duoc thanh lap khi nao?
questions.explanation: Thuc Phan lap nuoc Au Lac khoang nam 257 truoc Cong nguyen.

questions.prompt: Nguoi dan nuoc Van Lang duoc goi la gi?
questions.explanation: Cu dan nuoc Van Lang duoc goi la nguoi Lac Viet.

questions.prompt: Thuc Phan la thu linh cua nhom dan toc nao truoc khi lap nuoc Au Lac?
questions.explanation: Thuc Phan la thu linh cua nguoi Au Viet, sau do thong nhat voi Lac Viet thanh Au Lac.

questions.prompt: Nuoc Van Lang nam o vung nao cua Viet Nam ngay nay?
options: Bac Bo va Bac Trung Bo
questions.explanation: Nuoc Van Lang nam o vung Bac Bo va Bac Trung Bo ngay nay.

questions.prompt: Hai Ba Trung khoi nghia vao nam nao?
questions.explanation: Hai Ba Trung phat dong khoi nghia nam 40 sau Cong nguyen.

questions.prompt: Hai Ba Trung khoi nghia chong lai trieu dai nao?
questions.explanation: Hai Ba Trung khoi nghia chong lai ach do ho cua nha Dong Han.

questions.prompt: Chong cua ba Trung Trac la ai?
questions.explanation: Thi Sach la chong ba Trung Trac, bi Thai thu To Dinh giet hai.

questions.prompt: Hai Ba Trung phat dong khoi nghia tai dau?
questions.explanation: Khoi nghia duoc phat dong tai cua song Hat Mon (nay thuoc Phuc Tho, Ha Noi).

questions.prompt: Sau khi khoi nghia thanh cong, Trung Trac dat do o dau?
questions.explanation: Trung Trac len lam vua, dat kinh do o Me Linh (nay thuoc Ha Noi).

questions.prompt: Ai la tuong nha Han duoc cu sang dan ap khoi nghia Hai Ba Trung?
questions.explanation: Ma Vien la tuong nha Dong Han duoc cu sang dan ap khoi nghia nam 42-43 SCN.

questions.prompt: Cuoc khoi nghia Hai Ba Trung chiem duoc bao nhieu thanh tri?
questions.explanation: Quan khoi nghia da chiem duoc 65 thanh tri, duoi Thai thu To Dinh chay ve nuoc.

questions.prompt: Ngay tuong nho Hai Ba Trung la ngay nao (am lich)?
questions.explanation: Ngay mung 6 thang 2 am lich hang nam la ngay tuong nho Hai Ba Trung.

questions.prompt: "Bac thuoc" co nghia la gi?
options: Bi trieu dai phuong Bac do ho
questions.explanation: Bac thuoc la thoi ky dat nuoc ta bi cac trieu dai Trung Quoc (phuong Bac) do ho.

questions.prompt: Dieu dac biet gi ve cuoc khoi nghia Hai Ba Trung?
options: Co nhieu nu tuong tham gia
questions.explanation: Diem dac biet la co rat nhieu nu tuong tham gia, the hien truyen thong phu nu Viet Nam anh hung.
